svg.text: • Build systems: Bazel, Make, Gradle, Buck, Pants — DAG of targets, topo for build order.
• Package managers: npm, pip, apt — install order, dependency resolution, conflict detection.
• Schedulers: Airflow, Dagster, Prefect — DAG of tasks, run downstream when upstream finishes.
• CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins — job dependencies, parallel waves.
• Compilers: instruction scheduling, register allocation order, link order, IR pass ordering.
• Spreadsheet engines: Excel/Google Sheets recalc order over cell dependency DAGs.
• Databases: migration ordering, schema dependency, view materialization.
Beyond linearization — DAG algorithms enabled by topo order
• Longest path on a DAG: single pass in topo order with relaxation. O(V + E).
• Shortest path on a DAG: same skeleton, min instead of max. Beats Dijkstra.
• Counting paths between two vertices: DP over topo order.
• Critical path / PERT scheduling: longest path = project duration.
• Reachability / transitive closure on a DAG: bitset propagation in topo order.
• DP on DAG state-space: any DP whose dependency graph is a DAG.
Topo order turns "iterate carefully" into "iterate left to right."
